allow: Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0 Safari/537.36" "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Saira:wght@300;400&display=swap" -o assets/fonts/saira.css)

PowerShell($ok = $false; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8321/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; "Server ready: $ok")
